prompt: Create a black-and-white 35mm documentary street photograph of a quiet young East Asian woman standing beside a bakery display window in a busy city. She has long black hair, wears round dark sunglasses, a loose white button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, high-waisted dark jeans, a black belt, and a small wristwatch. She is looking down calmly at a smartphone held in both hands, with a reserved, introspective expression. The bakery case runs diagonally along the left side of the frame, filled with many pastries and doughnuts in trays behind reflective glass; the glass creates layered reflections of the woman, the street, and blurred pedestrians outside. Compose the shot vertically in a 2:3 aspect ratio, medium full-body crop from head to hips, with the woman placed slightly right of center and the pastry cabinet occupying the left third. Use shallow depth of field, soft natural window light, visible film grain, high-contrast monochrome tones, realistic reflections, gentle bokeh, and candid urban street-photography atmosphere. The city background should feel noisy and crowded but out of focus, while she appears still and quiet. No text, no logos, no watermark, no artificial glamour lighting.
promptEn: Create a black-and-white 35mm documentary street photograph of a quiet young East Asian woman standing beside a bakery display window in a busy city. She has long black hair, wears round dark sunglasses, a loose white button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, high-waisted dark jeans, a black belt, and a small wristwatch. She is looking down calmly at a smartphone held in both hands, with a reserved, introspective expression. The bakery case runs diagonally along the left side of the frame, filled with many pastries and doughnuts in trays behind reflective glass; the glass creates layered reflections of the woman, the street, and blurred pedestrians outside. Compose the shot vertically in a 2:3 aspect ratio, medium full-body crop from head to hips, with the woman placed slightly right of center and the pastry cabinet occupying the left third. Use shallow depth of field, soft natural window light, visible film grain, high-contrast monochrome tones, realistic reflections, gentle bokeh, and candid urban street-photography atmosphere. The city background should feel noisy and crowded but out of focus, while she appears still and quiet. No text, no logos, no watermark, no artificial glamour lighting.
promptZh: 创作一张 35mm 黑白纪实街头摄影作品，画面中一位安静的年轻东亚女性站在繁忙城市的烘焙店橱窗旁。她留着 黑色长发，戴着圆形深色墨镜，身穿宽松的白色衬衫并卷起袖子，搭配高腰深色牛仔裤、黑色腰带和一只小巧的手表。她双手拿着智能手机，平静地向下注视，表情内敛而沉思。烘焙店的橱窗沿画面左侧呈对角线延伸，玻璃后方的托盘里摆满了各种糕点和甜甜圈；玻璃映照出女性、街道以及窗外模糊行人的层叠倒影。采用 2:3 纵向构图，从头部到臀部的中景全身剪裁，女性位于画面中心偏右，糕点柜占据左侧三分之一。运用浅景深、柔和的自然窗光、可见的胶片颗粒感、高对比度的单色调、写实的倒影、柔和的焦外成像以及自然的城市街拍氛围。城市背景应呈现出嘈杂拥挤但失焦的状态，而她则显得静谧安详。画面中无文字、无标志、无水印，且不使用人工美颜灯光。
